description_long: This stereo sound system features a compact, rectangular main unit with a glossy black exterior finish. The front face is slightly recessed and appears to have a horizontal slot or panel, possibly for a CD or cassette, along with several small, round buttons or indicators. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist, modern design. The object sits on a flat, circular base, which may be a display stand or simply a shadow. No visible speakers, grilles, or external controls are apparent from these views, suggesting a streamlined, integrated form. The overall appearance is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for placement in urban interiors, garages, or entertainment spaces.
description: A compact, glossy black stereo sound system with a minimalist rectangular design and a smooth, unadorned exterior. The front features a recessed panel with small buttons or indicators.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed panel and small round buttons or indicators on the face of the stereo system.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, featureless side of the rectangular unit.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, unadorned surface and no visible ports or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a smooth, featureless surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A row of small round buttons or indicators is present on the lower right of the front face, adjacent to a horizontal slot or panel.
